title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
We reviewed all open reports today and took the following actions to keep the community safe:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Permanently banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Zero tolerance for phishing.
- toxic_runner — Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**False Positive Dismissed (1)**
- A high-severity report against core_maintainer was reviewed and found to be a coordinated mass-report by brigading users following a legitimate moderation decision. No action taken; the report is closed.

**No action required (2 medium, 1 low)**
- Remaining open reports (trusted_helper, bot_like_user_77, new_member_17) are medium/low severity and will be reviewed in the next moderation cycle.

We remain committed to a welcoming, safe community. If you witness abuse, please use the report tool. Thank you to everyone who reported these issues.
